## A. PolicyDenial constructors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: emits `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` when `AgentLoop` rejects a tool call because the tool is not in the allowlist.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: synthesizes a `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }` inside `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` when it intercepts a disallowed `ToolCallRequested` event.
